name: Garland Independent School District
districtFact: Garland ISD serves Garland, Rowlett, Sachse, and nearby Dallas County communities with a choice-of-school model that makes calendar planning especially important for transportation, magnet programs, and families comparing multiple campuses.

about.title: About Garland ISD Academic Calendar
about.content: Garland Independent School District is a public school district serving Garland, Rowlett, Sachse, and nearby Dallas County communities in the Dallas-Fort Worth area. The Garland ISD school schedule and district academic calendar help families plan student attendance, Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, staff development days, grading periods, and early dismissal dates. District-wide calendar dates are useful for school-year planning, while campus pages remain the best place to confirm testing windows, athletics, performances, graduation ceremonies, and school-specific events.

about.title: How to Use This Garland ISD Calendar
about.content: This page summarizes the official GISD academic calendar PDFs in a searchable format. Families should still confirm campus-specific events, testing windows, graduation ceremonies, athletics, and emergency schedule changes through Garland ISD and their assigned school.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Garland ISD Families
content: Track fall break separately because GISD schedules a full October break before the second grading period begins.
Add early dismissal dates to family calendars because some years list high-school-only early dismissal and other years list early dismissal times for all grade levels.
Watch staff development and student holiday dates because they often extend long weekends or break transitions.
Check the official GISD calendar page for revisions because the PDFs note that dates are subject to change.
Use district calendar dates for transportation, childcare, and travel planning, then verify campus-specific events with the assigned school.

compareIntro: Compare the Garland ISD school calendar with other Texas district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

customSections.label: Planning Guide for Garland ISD Families
customSections.content: Families in Garland, Rowlett, Sachse, and nearby Dallas County communities often use the Garland ISD academic calendar as a planning base for Garland ISD vacation dates, childcare, transportation, commute timing, and activity schedules across the Dallas-Fort Worth area. The district calendar is the right place to check student attendance days and major breaks, while campus calendars should be used for testing schedules, athletics, performances, ceremonies, and school-specific deadlines.

groups.label: Common planning uses
items: Use Fall Break and Spring Break for travel planning because both are full weekday breaks.
Use staff development and student holiday dates to plan childcare for non-break no-school days.
Use early dismissal dates to adjust pickup plans and after-school activities.
Confirm campus-specific events before making plans that depend on testing, athletics, graduation, or performances.

customSections.label: Frequently Downloaded Garland ISD Calendar Resources
customSections.content: Families looking for a Garland ISD printable calendar usually need either the official PDF, a searchable date list, or a calendar import file for a personal calendar app. This page links the official district source and provides a one-time .ics file generated from the reviewed calendar records.

groups.label: Calendar resource types
items: Printable PDF: use the official Garland ISD calendar PDF linked from the district source.
Google Calendar: import the .ics calendar file from MySchoolDates.
Apple Calendar and Outlook: use the same .ics file for a one-time import.
Searchable dates: use the full date table on this page for holidays, breaks, student holidays, and early dismissal dates.

customSections.label: Garland ISD Calendar Research & Verification
customSections.content: Reviewed by the MySchoolDates Education Research Team, this page uses the official Garland ISD calendar PDF and district calendar page as its source base. MySchoolDates reviews Garland ISD calendar data from official district sources before publishing the searchable calendar, FAQ answers, and calendar import file. The review process focuses on the first day, last day, major breaks, holidays, student no-school dates, staff development dates, and early dismissal information available in the official source.

groups.label: Verification process
items: Official Garland ISD school year calendar source reviewed.
First day, last day, Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, and early dismissal dates compared against source records.
Calendar import file generated from the Garland ISD date records used on this page.
Last-minute campus events and emergency changes should still be confirmed with Garland ISD and the assigned school.
